nasb.text: Then Abigail quickly arose, and rode on a donkey, with her five maidens who attended her; and she followed the messengers of David and became his wife.

esv.text: And Abigail hurried and rose and mounted a donkey, and her five young women attended her. She followed the messengers of David and became his wife.

cnv.text: 亞比該急忙起來，騎上驢，帶著五個跟隨她的女僕，跟從大衛的使者去了，就作了大衛的妻子。

ccb.text: 她连忙骑上驴，带了五个侍女，跟随大卫的使者前去，做了大卫的妻子。
